Moana 2 (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $460,405,297Details
International Box Office $598,836,867
Worldwide Box Office $1,059,242,164
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Moana and Maui are reunited after three years for an expansive new voyage alongside a crew of unlikely seafarers. After receiving an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors, Moana must journey to the far seas of Oceania and into dangerous, long-lost waters for an adventure unlike anything she’s ever faced.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$139,787,385 (30.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.29 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 7.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,200 opening theaters/4,200 max. theaters, 9.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $483,624,698

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 27th, 2024 (Wide) by Walt Disney
November 27th, 2024 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: November 27th, 2024 (Wide), released as Moana 2 (모아나 2) (South Korea)
November 27th, 2024 (Wide), released as Vaiana 2 (Netherlands)
November 27th, 2024 (Wide), released as Vaiana 2 (France)
November 27th, 2024 (Wide) (Belgium)
November 27th, 2024 (Wide) (Indonesia)
Video Release: January 28th, 2025 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for action/peril.
(Rating bulletin 2855 (cert #55105), 10/9/2024)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Franchise: Moana
Filming location (city or town): Vancouver, BC, Canada

Synopsis

Moana and Maui are reunited after three years for an expansive new voyage alongside a crew of unlikely seafarers. After receiving an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors, Moana must journey to the far seas of Oceania and into dangerous, long-lost waters for an adventure unlike anything she’s ever faced.
